sources.title: Solutions Engineer: Average Salary & Pay Trends | Glassdoor
sources.note: Blended avg $169,407, 25-75th pctile $138,817-$211,507; likely includes pre-sales SE roles with different comp structure (commission), caution against direct use

sources.title: Senior Solutions Engineer: Average Salary & Pay Trends | Glassdoor
sources.note: Avg $213,792, range $176,820-$265,408 — role-mix concern (pre-sales vs support) limits usability
